title: Persona for a Business Executive
scenario: Create a persona for a high-level business executive focused on innovation and technology. The target output should be a detailed persona description.
constraints: Must include a brief description of the executive's leadership style
Must highlight the executive's vision for the company

evaluationCriteria.description: Are the constraints met (leadership style, vision)?
Does the description showcase a confident and professional tone?
Does the description accurately answer the prompt regarding the executive's focus?
